# ADK-Rust v0.4 (LLM Recall)

High-signal index for ADK-Rust v0.4. Use specialized reference files for deep dives.

## Core Reference Files
- **[adk-rust.md](adk-rust.md)**: Main Index & Architecture Overview.
- **[core.md](core.md)**: Primitives (Identity, Content, Runner, State Scoping).
- **[agents.md](agents.md)**: Agent Types (Llm, Workflow, Graph, Multi-Agent, Realtime).
- **[tools.md](tools.md)**: Capabilities (#[tool] macro, Browser, MCP, RAG, UI).
- **[models.md](models.md)**: Model Providers (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Local).
- **[deployment.md](deployment.md)**: Production (Launcher, Server API, A2A, Telemetry).
- **[studio.md](studio.md)**: Visual Designer (Action Nodes, Triggers).
- **[guides.md](guides.md)**: Project Standards & Evaluation.

## v0.4 Cheat Sheet

### Core Types
- `AdkIdentity`: AppName + UserId + SessionId (typed triple).
- `State Scopes`: `user:` (cross-session), `app:` (cross-user), `temp:` (turn-level).
- `Content`: Role + Parts (Text, InlineData, FunctionCall, FunctionResponse).

### Top Patterns
- **Zero-Boilerplate Tool**: Define args struct with `JsonSchema`, use `#[tool]` on async fn.
- **Agent Transfer**: Add `.sub_agent()` to parent; LLM calls `transfer_to_agent`.
- **Graph Cycles**: Use `GraphAgent::builder()` with `.node()` and `.edge(node, "loop_back")`.
- **Realtime Voice**: `RealtimeAgent::builder()` + `.server_vad()` + WebSocket/WebRTC.
- **Local Inference**: `MistralRsModel` for native GPU acceleration without daemons.

### Production Readiness
- **Tracing**: `init_telemetry("svc")` for structured logs and spans.
- **Resilience**: `.default_retry_budget(RetryBudget::new(3, Duration))` on agents.
- **Compaction**: `EventsCompactionConfig` in `Runner` to summarize old history.
- **Evaluation**: Use `Evaluator::new(criteria)` with `.test.json` trajectory files.
